file_name: Magenta Therapeutics, Inc. - Master Development and Manufacturing Agreement.txt

perturbation.original_text: 1.16 "Project Plant(s)" means a mutually agreed to project plan, statement of work, quotation or other ordering document that sets forth a description of the Services to be provided by Bachem, and related timeline(s), costs, and other relevant details, that references, and is expressly governed by this Agreement and is executed by an authorized representative of each Party. Notwithstanding, the Parties acknowledge and agree that the quotations identified in Appendix A attached hereto are Project Plans, and are governed by this Agreement, even though they do not expressly reference this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: 1.16 "Project Plant(s)" means a mutually agreed to project plan, statement of work, quotation or other ordering document that sets forth a description of the Services to be provided by Bachem, and related timeline(s), costs, and other relevant details, that references, and is expressly governed by this Agreement and is executed by an authorized representative of each Party. Notwithstanding, the Parties acknowledge and agree that the quotations identified in Appendix A attached hereto are considered Quotations, and are not governed by this Agreement, unless they expressly reference this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'Project Plans' to 'Quotations' and stating they are not governed by the agreement unless they expressly reference it, we contradict the original statement that quotations in Appendix A are indeed Project Plans and governed by the agreement. This creates uncertainty about which terms in Appendix A are binding.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.1 Project Plans. All Project Plans entered into after the Effective Date shall be added to Appendix A after execution by the Parties of a written amendment in the form of the "Amendment to Appendix A", attached hereto (the "Amendment"). There shall be no limit to the number of Project Plans that may be added to Appendix A and governed by the terms and conditions of this Agreement. In the event of a conflict between the terms of a Project Plan or any attachments thereto or any purchase order issued in connection therewith and this Agreement, the terms of this Agreement will govern.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original definition (1.16) stated that quotations in Appendix A are 'Project Plans' and governed by the agreement. The changed definition states they are 'Quotations' and *not* governed by the agreement unless they reference it. This directly conflicts with section 3.1 which states that 'All Project Plans entered into after the Effective Date shall be added to Appendix A...and governed by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.' The change introduces a clear contradiction about whether the quotations in Appendix A are governed by the agreement, making it a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 5.2 Services. Bachem shall provide the Services in accordance with each Project Plan. Bachem will perform all Services in accordance with this Agreement and the agreed upon Specifications. All Products shall be packaged, labeled and shipped in accordance with this Agreement, the applicable Project Plan and all Applicable Laws. Bachem and its employees and agents have, and will continue to have, the knowledge, experience, facilities, equipment and skill to provide, and will provide, the Services in a professional and timely manner. Services will conform to consistently high standards of workmanship and the specifications applicable to each Project Plan.
perturbation.changed_text: 5.2 Services. Bachem shall provide the Manufacturing in accordance with each Project Plan. Bachem will perform all Services in accordance with this Agreement and the agreed upon Specifications. All Products shall be packaged, labeled and shipped in accordance with this Agreement, the applicable Project Plan and all Applicable Laws. Bachem and its employees and agents have, and will continue to have, the knowledge, experience, facilities, equipment and skill to provide, and will provide, the Services in a professional and timely manner. Services will conform to consistently high standards of workmanship and the specifications applicable to each Project Plan.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Services' to 'Manufacturing' in the first sentence introduces ambiguity. While Bachem is still required to provide 'Services' as defined, the emphasis on 'Manufacturing' may suggest that other aspects of the Services outlined in a Project Plan (e.g., Development Work) are not prioritized, leading to a potential dispute over the scope of Bachem's obligations, making it unclear what service are to be prioritised.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1.17 "Services" means, with respect to a Project Plan, those services (including Development Work and manufacture of Product) to be provided by Bachem, as described in such Project Plan.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to "Services" which is explicitly defined as including both Development Work and manufacture of Product. The changed text uses "Manufacturing" instead of "Services" in the first sentence. This introduces ambiguity as to whether Bachem is only prioritizing Manufacturing over other services such as Development Work, contradicting the definition in section 1.17 which states that 'Services' includes both Development Work and Manufacture of Product.

perturbation.original_text: 8.4 Magenta's Developed Intellectual Property. Any invention (whether patentable or not), discoveries, improvements, works-of-authorship or other intellectual property made, conceived or reduced to practice by Bachem in connection with its performance under this Agreement or any Project Plan, which expressly excludes Bachem Intellectual Property ("Magenta Developed Intellectual Property"), shall be exclusively owned by Magenta. For the avoidance of doubt, Magenta Developed Intellectual Property includes Magenta Data. Bachem hereby assigns, and agrees to assign, to Magenta all of its right, title and interest to and in any Magenta Developed Intellectual Property, including all related intellectual property rights. Magenta grants to Bachem a limited, non-exclusive license to use any Magenta Developed Intellectual Property to manufacture and release the Product for Magenta in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and any applicable Project Plan.
perturbation.changed_text: 8.4 Magenta's Developed Intellectual Property. Any invention (whether patentable or not), discoveries, improvements, works-of-authorship or other intellectual property made, conceived or reduced to practice by Bachem in connection with its performance under this Agreement or any Project Plan, which expressly excludes Bachem Intellectual Property ("Bachem Project Intellectual Property"), shall be exclusively owned by Magenta. For the avoidance of doubt, Bachem Project Intellectual Property includes Magenta Data. Bachem hereby assigns, and agrees to assign, to Magenta all of its right, title and interest to and in any Bachem Project Intellectual Property, including all related intellectual property rights. Magenta grants to Bachem a limited, non-exclusive license to use any Bachem Project Intellectual Property to manufacture and release the Product for Magenta in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and any applicable Project Plan.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'Magenta Developed Intellectual Property' to 'Bachem Project Intellectual Property' creates a direct contradiction. The section initially states that any intellectual property developed by Bachem, excluding Bachem's pre-existing IP, belongs to Magenta. By renaming it 'Bachem Project Intellectual Property', it implies that Magenta is now assigning ownership of this intellectual property to Bachem, which is in direct contradiction to the initial statement of exclusive ownership by Magenta. This also creates further confusion, as the original Bachem's Intellectual Property, now it's also having project Intellectual property
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8.4 Magenta's Developed Intellectual Property. Any invention (whether patentable or not), discoveries, improvements, works-of-authorship or other intellectual property made, conceived or reduced to practice by Bachem in connection with its performance under this Agreement or any Project Plan, which expressly excludes Bachem Intellectual Property ("Bachem Project Intellectual Property"), shall be exclusively owned by Magenta. For the avoidance of doubt, Bachem Project Intellectual Property includes Magenta Data. Bachem hereby assigns, and agrees to assign, to Magenta all of its right, title and interest to and in any Bachem Project Intellectual Property, including all related intellectual property rights. Magenta grants to Bachem a limited, non-exclusive license to use any Bachem Project Intellectual Property to manufacture and release the Product for Magenta in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement and any applicable Project Plan.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Magenta Developed Intellectual Property' to 'Bachem Project Intellectual Property' directly contradicts the original intent of Section 8.4. The original text specifies that Magenta exclusively owns intellectual property developed by Bachem, excluding Bachem's pre-existing IP. By renaming the IP as 'Bachem Project Intellectual Property', it implies that Bachem now owns this intellectual property, which creates direct contradiction to the statement 'Magenta shall be exclusively owned by Magenta'. This misaligned terminology leads to ambiguity and conflicting obligations, falling under the definition of 'Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction'.
